description: Structured output schema for the AI categorization and routing layer of the voice-based citizen grievance platform.

case_id.description: Unique case identifier for the processed grievance.

input_transcript.description: Corrected or speaker-labeled transcript received from the ASR/diarization pipeline.

language_mix.description: Main language mix detected in the transcript.

institution_category.description: The public-service or institutional destination category.

primary_institution.description: Likely institution or public body that should receive the case.

summary.description: Short factual summary of the grievance. It must not invent information.

human_review_flag.description: True if the case should be reviewed by a human before routing.

reasoning_short.description: Short explanation of why the category and routing were selected.

category_override.description: Optional employee correction for routing or category after review.

review_notes.description: Optional notes added by a human reviewer.
